name: Skimlinks Affiliate Intelligence
summary: Weekly Skimlinks merchant sync + a built-in affiliate-intelligence lens (commissions, new/removed, top movers).
description: Pulls the full Skimlinks merchant catalog into your Supabase on a schedule and tracks every change -- new/removed merchants, commission moves, tenure. Adds a built-in Affiliate Intelligence lens (searchable merchant grid, top movers, per-merchant commission-change timeline) and lets agents query the data or drag a merchant straight into a session. Replaces the old external dashboard -- everything lives inside the control center.

requires.label: Supabase service-role key (server-side ONLY -- never sent to the browser)

draggables.label: merchant
draggables.note: drag a merchant into a Claude session

routine.name: Skimlinks weekly sync
routine.desc: Pull the full Skimlinks merchant catalog -> Supabase; track new/removed merchants + commission changes.
